Hackathon 2026
Date: 15 September 2026
Duration: 24 Hours
Venue: Innovation Lab
Team Size: 2–4 Members
Maximum Teams: 30
Registration Deadline: 10 September 2026
About the Event:

Hackathon 2026 is a 24-hour coding marathon where teams build innovative solutions to real-world problems. Participants will develop applications, software tools, or tech prototypes and present them to judges for evaluation.
Event Rules:

• Team participation only.
• Original ideas are mandatory.
• Follow coding ethics.
• Judges' decision will be final.
